name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Quote cards
description: Testimonial section with testimonial quotes displayed as individual cards.

name: With star rating
description: Testimonial section with testimonials that include explicit star-rating indicators.

name: Centered
description: Testimonial section with center-aligned content stack with balanced vertical rhythm.

name: Large feature quote
description: Testimonial section with single oversized quote block for flagship testimonial.

name: Minimal with top border
description: Testimonial section with minimal testimonial styling accented by a top border.

name: Avatar grid
description: Testimonial section with avatar-led testimonial grid for person-first social proof.

name: Dark inverted
description: Testimonial section with dark theme testimonial treatment with inverted contrast.

name: Masonry columns
description: Testimonial section with staggered masonry testimonial columns with variable card heights.

name: Social proof cards
description: Testimonial section with social-proof card mix with names, roles, and outcomes.

name: Stats bar
description: Testimonial section with testimonial section paired with a supporting metrics bar.

name: Gradient accent cards
description: Testimonial section with testimonial cards with gradient accent backgrounds.
